description: Routes to CFAv1Forwarder for simple stream creation
prompt: I want to create a money stream from my wallet to another address using Superfluid. What function should I call and what are the parameters?

criteria.description: Response contains CFAv1Forwarder-specific details (function signatures, address, or parameter types) from the reference
Recommends setFlowrate or createFlow from CFAv1Forwarder (not raw CFA agreement)
Does not fabricate function names, parameter names, or addresses

golden_facts: CFAv1Forwarder is the recommended contract for simple stream operations
setFlowrate(token, receiver, flowrate) or createFlow(token, sender, receiver, flowrate, userData)
flowrate is int96, denominated in wei per second
anti_patterns: Calling ConstantFlowAgreementV1 directly without mentioning it requires Host routing (ctx: bytes)
Fabricating function signatures not in CFAv1Forwarder

description: Routes to GDAv1Forwarder for pool creation and distribution
prompt: How do I create a GDA distribution pool in Superfluid and add members to it?

criteria.description: Response contains GDAv1Forwarder or SuperfluidPool-specific details (function signatures, parameters) from the references
Does not invent parameters or function signatures

golden_facts: GDAv1Forwarder.updateMemberUnits to add members with unit allocations
Pool address is returned by createPool
anti_patterns: Calling GDA agreement directly without mentioning Host context requirement

description: Routes to Super Apps guide and CFASuperAppBase for callback questions
prompt: I want to build a Super App that reacts to incoming CFA streams. What base contract should I inherit, what callbacks do I override, and what library do I use for outgoing streams inside callbacks?

criteria.description: Response contains CFASuperAppBase-specific details (callback names, registration, WithCtx variants) from the reference
Explains CFASuperAppBase as the starting point for CFA-only Super Apps
Mentions app credit or deposit implications for relaying flows

golden_facts: CFASuperAppBase is the simplified base for CFA-only Super Apps
Use SuperTokenV1Library WithCtx variants inside callbacks
App credit allows zero-balance relay operations
anti_patterns: Implementing raw ISuperApp callbacks without mentioning CFASuperAppBase
Not mentioning the Super App registration requirement

description: Routes to VestingSchedulerV3 for vesting questions
prompt: How do I set up a vesting schedule with a cliff using Superfluid?

criteria.description: Response contains VestingSchedulerV3-specific details (function names, keeper requirements, scheduling params) from the reference
Mentions that execution requires off-chain keepers

golden_facts: VestingSchedulerV3 handles vesting with cliffs and streams
May need allowlisting for keepers to trigger
anti_patterns: Referencing VestingSchedulerV1 or V2 (only V3 is in the skill)

description: Routes to subgraph references for indexed data queries
prompt: I need to query all active streams for a specific sender on Optimism. What is the GraphQL query, the endpoint URL, and are there any caveats about data freshness?

criteria.description: Response contains subgraph-specific details (entity names, endpoint URL pattern, field names) from the reference
Notes subgraph lags real-time state (prefer RPC for current balances)
Does not fabricate entity or field names

golden_facts: Use protocol-v1 subgraph for querying streams
Query the Stream entity filtered by sender
anti_patterns: Fabricating GraphQL entity names not in the schema
